title: canarium lyi
intro: Canarium lyi, also known as the Pacific nut tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its seeds, which contain a high concentration of triglycerides and have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Canarium lyi include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-inflammatory properties. Canarium lyi can be prepared into herbal supplements, extracts, and teas, which are often used to support heart health and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
